request: Set up a spacecraft in a 500 km circular low-Earth orbit at 51.6 degrees inclination, propagate for one day, and report the altitude and semi-major axis.
intent: A single spacecraft on a ~500 km circular LEO (SMA about 6878 km, ECC about 0, inclination 51.6 deg), propagated for about one day, with a ReportFile recording altitude and semi-major axis.
